data.title: Shopify brands now shoppable inside ChatGPT
data.description: Harley Finkelstein, Shopify's president, has posted a video to LinkedIn showing how the ChatGPT integration will work. And as of March 24 — when he posted to LinkedIn — the Shopify-ChatGPT integration is live, according to his written post accompanying the video.

data.title: Home Depot expands Pro platform with AI and project management features
data.description: The home improvement retailer said its expansion is part of a broader effort to build an integrated ecosystem of tools and services for professional customers.

data.title: CarParts.com, A-Premium launch 30,000 SKUs for JC Whitney line
data.description: To support the expansion, CarParts.com completed an $8 million private placement of common stock at $0.80 per share.

data.title: Bridgeline, Znode partner on AI search for B2B ecommerce
data.description: The companies designed the AI search integration to improve how business buyers find and navigate products online, particularly in large and complex catalogs common in B2B distribution.

data.title: Algolia announces enhancements to Shopify AI search integration
data.description: Algolia said "full reindex" times have decreased by more than 80% for large product catalogs. That time decreased from more than 45 minutes to less than 10 minutes, according to Algolia.
